title: Japancraft
description: This mod adds new japanese-style features like a new mob from princess mononoke, structures, a new biome, a new dimension, armor, weapons and more!
body:
# JapanCraft 🎌

JapanCraft brings traditional Japanese culture, myths, and nature into the world of Minecraft.  
From special ores to magical talismans, sacred trees, and mystical creatures – this mod expands your game with unique content.  

---

## ⚒️ Blocks

- **Tamahagane Block** – A sturdy block made of Japanese steel, perfect for building.  
- **Tamahagane Ore** – A rare ore that drops Tamahagane (with some experience). Can only be found underground in the Momiji Valley!  
- **Tamahagane Slab / Stair / Wall** – Decorative variants of the steel for creative builds.  
- **Tamahagane Button & Pressure Plate** – Practical redstone components made of Tamahagane.  

- **Red Wood Planks** – Japan-inspired wood for building.  
- **Red Wood Fence & Fence Gate** – Classic wooden fences in a red design.  
- **Red Wood Door & Trapdoor** – Doors and trapdoors matching the Red Wood set.  

- **Sakura Water Block** – A mystical fluid inspired by cherry blossoms.  
- **Lucky Box** – A mysterious box with surprising effects.  
  - Right-click: Add phrases to it.  
  - Throw a diamond: Outputs a random phrase in the chat.  
- **Rice Crop** – Grow rice and harvest a new food source.  

- **Tsubaki (Camellia)** – A Japanese flower.  
- **Tsubaki Flower Pot** – Decorative variant in a flower pot.  

- **Maple Log, Wood, Stripped Variants** – Japanese maple tree with unique textures.  
- **Maple Planks** – Wood variant for building.  
- **Maple Leaves** – Colorful leaves, perfect for landscapes.  
- **Maple Sapling** – Plant and grow your own maple tree.  

---

## 🏮 Items

- **Omamori** – A Japanese lucky charm with special powers.  
- **Onigiri** – Delicious Japanese rice ball to eat.  
- **Charcoal Briquette** – Compressed charcoal for longer burning time.  
- **Tamahagane Ingot** – The core material for new equipment.  

- **Katana** – A sharp Japanese blade for melee combat.  
  - Special ability: Right-click shortly before impact to block damage!  
- **Yumi Bow** – A traditional Japanese longbow.  

- **Tamahagane Armor (Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, Boots)** – Strong armor forged from Tamahagane.  
- **Tamahagane Horse Armor** – Protects your horse with Japanese steel.  

- **Sakura Water Bucket** – Transport and use the mystical Sakura fluid.  
- **Rice** – Edible rice as a basic food.  
- **Rice Seeds** – For planting rice fields.  

- **Kodama Spawn Egg** – Summon the forest spirits of Japanese mythology.  

---

## 🍶 Potions & Effects

- **Zen Mind Potion** – A potion that grants the unique “Zen Mind” effect.  
- **Zen Mind Status Effect** – Helps you gain inner peace and special strength.  

---

## 🧑‍🌾 Villagers

- **Miko Profession** – A new villager profession connected to the Lucky Box.  

---

## 🗝️ Gameplay Features

- **Meditation Keybinding (V)** – Meditate, float slowly, and regenerate faster.  

---

## 🛡️ Armor

- **Tamahagane Armor** – New armor set, currently only available in Creative or via commands.  

---

## 🌿 Mobs

- **Kodama** – Mystical forest spirits from Japanese folklore. Small, mysterious, and nature-bound. They only appear in the Momiji Valley – but in large numbers!  

---

## 🌸 Dimension & Biomes

- **Spirit Realm** – An alternate dimension full of secrets.  
  - Uses the Overworld’s generator logic but with unique Japanese biomes.  
  - Contains the **Momiji Valley Biome** – a valley full of maple trees with special atmosphere, unique vegetation, and custom mob spawning.  

---

## 🏠 Structures

- **Small House** – A small Japanese hut that only generates in the Momiji Valley biome.  

---

## 🖼️ Paintings

- **Japan** – A classic painting with Japanese flair.  
- **Samurai** – Honoring the warriors of Japanese history.  
- **Volcano** – An artwork inspired by Japan’s volcanic landscapes.
